name: Rice-Crust Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. With the back of a spoon, press the rice into a greased 9-in. pie plate to form a crust.
2. Drizzle with butter.
3. Bake at 350°F for 3 minutes; remove from the oven.
4. Combine ham, cheeses and hot pepper sauce; sprinkle over rice.
5. Beat eggs, milk, paprika, garlic powder and onion powder; pour over ham mixture.
6. Sprinkle with parsley.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Let stand 5-10 minutes before cutting.
